title: Divide by Groups option is resetting after refresh

posts.author: gvitallo (Gianna Vitallo)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello!

I’m running into an issue with the ‘Divide by Groups’ option.

I prefer to have my ‘Divide by Groups’ in the Kanban board checked off; however, when I click to another board or refresh the page, Monday un-checks by ‘Divide by Groups’ preference.

Is there any way to keep this preference locked?
